intended_use: 1CMR Pro is software that displays, analyses and transfers DICOM cardiovascular images acquired in Cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance (CMR) scanners, specifically structure, function and flow in the he
intended_use_full: 1CMR Pro is software that displays, analyses and transfers DICOM cardiovascular images acquired in Cardiovascular Magnetic Resonance (CMR) scanners, specifically structure, function and flow in the heart and major vessels using multi-slice, multi-phase, multi-parametric and velocity encoded CMR images. It is compatible with 1.5T and 3T CMR acquisitions.
target_condition: cardiac structure and function assessment in patients with suspected or confirmed cardiac disease including dilated cardiomyopathy, hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, myocardial infarction, and left ventricular hypertrophy
ground_truth: Three independent US-based truthers with >5 years experience performing manual segmentation and measurement
other_metrics: DICE scores for LV short axis contours: AI 0.90 vs Truther-to-Truther 0.89; Coefficient of variation (CoV) - LVEF: AI 4.3±0.3% vs Clinician 7.0±0.6% (p<0.001); LV mass CoV: AI 3.8±0.3% vs Clinician 4.6±0.3% (p<0.001); LVEDV CoV: AI 4.9±0.4% vs Clinician 6.2±0.5% (p<0.001); LVESV CoV: AI 5.4% (4.3-6.4%) vs Clinician 11.4% (6.5-15.6%, p=0.008)
